narrative:
Franklin / Conesville / Virginia (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,131 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.6 percentage points.
